# 03_Outputs — Generated Deliverables

**Do not edit files in this folder manually.**

Deliverables here are generated by `/ship`, `/visualize`, and `/status` from the knowledge base in `02_Work/`. Every section traces back to verified insights.

## Output types

`/ship` generates these deliverables (Template+JSON architecture — static HTML template + embedded JSON data):

| Type | File | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `prd` | PRD.html | Product Requirements Document |
| `report` | REPORT.html | Research report |
| `presentation` | PRESENTATION.html | Reveal.js presentation |
| `benchmark-ux` | BENCHMARK_UX.html | UX benchmark analysis |
| `persona` | PERSONAS.html | User persona cards |
| `journey-map` | JOURNEY_MAP.html | User journey map |
| `lean-canvas` | LEAN_CANVAS.html | Lean Canvas (business model) |
| `user-stories` | USER_STORIES.html | JTBD user stories |
| `audit` | — | Inline quality report (no file) |
| `strategy` | — | Strategic recommendations (no file) |

Other generators:
- `/visualize` → Mermaid diagrams (system-map, insights, conflicts) as HTML
- `/status` → STATUS.html — interactive Work layer dashboard

## How to change outputs

1. Update the source of truth: add sources to `01_Sources/`, run `/extract`, `/analyze`, and `/resolve`.
2. Run `/audit` to check readiness.
3. Run `/ship [type]` to generate documents, or `/visualize` to generate diagrams.

If you edit an output directly, your changes will be overwritten on the next run.

## Custom Outputs (_custom/)

Non-pipeline deliverables produced during freemode sessions (custom presentations, iterative HTML, ad-hoc analysis) live in `_custom/`.

- The agent proposes a file organization before the first write to `_custom/`.
- `/reset --output` does **NOT** delete `_custom/` — these outputs are preserved across resets.
- To clear custom outputs, delete them manually or run `/reset` with explicit confirmation.
